title: Grocery channel-tool + SSE events contract (v1)
description: Conversation/voice surface for the grocery domain: the channel tools, their scope gating, and the item-list confirmation card WRITE tools return. Bound to app.services.conversation.tools.grocery + the confirmation contract by tests/test_grocery_contract.py.

confirmation_card.trigger: structured_preview contains an 'items' list (agent_loop tags card_form=item_list)
confirmation_card.safety_visibility: Add canonicalizes/screens before freezing; remove/state load the existing item annotation. The committed add consumes the same server-prepared operands shown on the card.
confirmation_card.edits: Add-item edits are structurally validated, then the async prepare hook reruns canonicalization/screening and replaces the frozen card and operands before acceptance.

list_version.read_semantics: exact UUID lookup only; never creates a list and never follows an active-list alias

household_context_hash.note: Frozen from HouseholdContextSnapshot.context_hash at proposal and compared to a freshly resolver-produced HouseholdContextSnapshot at commit. Reconstructing from DietaryContext or using compute_profile_context_hash is prohibited.

snapshot_transport.proposal_source: HouseholdContextResolver output for the converse turn
